prompt: I have a scanned PDF document...
assertions: Agent tries extract-text.ts first before OCR (text-before-OCR principle)
Agent uses ocr-pdf.ts for the scanned document
Agent sets DPI to 600 as requested for better accuracy (--dpi 600)
Agent uses JSON format for structured OCR output with confidence scores (--format json)
Agent uses extract-images.ts for image extraction
Agent extracts images as JPEG format (--format jpeg)
Agent specifies output directory for extracted images (--output-dir)
Agent mentions or references confidence scores from OCR output
